message:
feat: Add Two-Flow Type System to async state machine and function signatures

- Add getAsyncVarType() helper for Two-Flow aware type emission in async
- Add getAsyncReturnType() for async function return type inference
- Replace hardcoded i64 types with type inference + confidence checks
- Apply Two-Flow to both genAsyncStateMachine() and genSyncFunction()
- Update function signature generation to check TypeConfidence
- Use runtime.PyValue for uncertain parameter types instead of i64

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ pub const SimpleRuntime = struct {
             .scheduler = undefined,
             .spawner = undefined,
             .yielder = undefined,
-            .queue = std.ArrayList(*Task).init(allocator),
+            .queue = .{},
             .mutex = std.Thread.Mutex{},
             .allocator = allocator,
         };
@@ -207,8 +207,8 @@ pub const Runtime = struct {
         var runtime = Runtime{
             .config = config,
             .processors = processors,
-            .machines = std.ArrayList(*Machine).init(allocator),
-            .global_queue = std.ArrayList(*Task).init(allocator),
+            .machines = .{},
+            .global_queue = .{},
             .global_mutex = std.Thread.Mutex{},
             .spawner = undefined,
             .yielder = undefined,

-            .machines = std.ArrayList(*Machine).init(allocator),
